name: accounts-repo
description: Client-owned financial repos for Malaysia Sdn Bhd year-end review packs.

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir auth-service typecheck && pnpm --dir frontend typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm test:rust && pnpm test:auth && pnpm test:frontend && pnpm build:all
scripts.clean: rm -rf frontend/dist auth-service/dist frontend/*.tsbuildinfo auth-service/*.tsbuildinfo test-results playwright-report
